title: Pvprp
description: Good PvP resource pack with short grass, Shrek totem, mini items, fullbright, clear water, transparent GUI, dynamic HP and armor bars, and custom shield sounds.
body:
A very good PvP resource pack that improves visibility and gameplay. It includes short grass so you can see players more easily during fights. The pack has a Shrek totem and a small mini totem animation that does not block the screen. Weapons and items in the hand are smaller, which gives a cleaner view while fighting.

Fullbright is included, so caves and dark areas are brighter. The water is very clear, making underwater visibility better. The GUI is changed and more transparent, which makes the screen look cleaner and more modern.

The health bar is dynamic and the armor display is improved for PvP players. The shield also has custom Soviet-style sounds and a status effect when used. The main menu and some GUI elements are also changed.

Overall, this resource pack is designed for PvP players who want better visibility, smoother fights, and a clean and simple look while playing Minecraft.
